title: AN ACT NAMING THE PHILIPPINE NATIONAL POLICE PROVINCIAL OFFICE IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF LAGAWE, PROVINCE OF IFUGAO AS CAMP COLONEL JOAQUIN P. DUNUAN

chunks.text:
H. NO. 4940 / 100 OG No. 49, 8249 (Dec. 6, 2004) ; 20 VLD 2d 166

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 9331, August 08, 2004 ]

AN ACT NAMING THE PHILIPPINE NATIONAL POLICE PROVINCIAL OFFICE IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF LAGAWE, PROVINCE OF IFUGAO AS CAMP COLONEL JOAQUIN P. DUNUAN

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SEC. 1. The Philippine National Police (PNP) Provincial Office in the Municipality of Lagawe, Province of Ifugao is hereby named Camp Col. Joaquin P. Dunuan.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved,

(Sgd.) JOSE DE VENECIA JR.

(Sgd.) FRANKLIN M. DRILON

Speaker of the House of Representatives

President of the Senate

This Act which originated in the House of Representatives was finally passed by the House of Representatives and the Senate on June 10, 2004.

(Sgd.) ROBERTO P. NAZARENO

(Sgd.) OSCAR G. YABES

Secretary General

House of Representatives

Secretary of the Senate

Approved:

GLORIA MACAPAGAL-ARROYO

President of the Philippines

* Lapsed into law on August 8, 2004 without the signature of the President, in accordance with Article VI, Section 27(1) of the Constitution.
